about_description: Backend and Full Stack Developer in Veracruz, Mexico. Passionate about technology, innovation, and design. Committed to creating exceptional experiences and creative solutions.
current_experience_description: Upon completing my Professional Residence at the software development company BWL, I successfully earned my degree as a Computer Systems Engineer. This experience not only solidified my technical skills in developing robust applications but also provided invaluable insights into professional workflows, collaborative problem-solving, and delivering high-quality technological solutions in a corporate environment.

This position allowed me to refine my programming logic, adopt industry best practices, and contribute effectively to the software development lifecycle within a collaborative team environment.
